"DNN (formerly DotNetNuke) is an open-source web content management platform (CMS) in the Microsoft ecosystem. Starting in version 6.0.0 and prior to version 10.2.2, in the friends feature, a user could craft a request that would force the acceptance of a friend request on another user. Version 10.2.2 patches the issue.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00183, "percentile": 0.07988}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-fpj4-9qhx-5m6m", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-04-10T21:07:08Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-fpj4-9qhx-5m6m", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-fpj4-9qhx-5m6m"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-40305"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-04-17T22:16:32Z", "published_at": "2026-04-10T21:07:08Z", "references": ["https://github.com/dnnsoftware/Dnn.Platform/security/advisories/GHSA-fpj4-9qhx-5m6m", "https://github.com/dnnsoftware/Dnn.Platform/releases/tag/v10.2.2", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-40305", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-fpj4-9qhx-5m6m"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/dnnsoftware/Dnn.Platform/security-advisories/GHSA-fpj4-9qhx-5m6m", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/dnnsoftware/Dnn.Platform", "summary": "DNN: Force Friend Request Acceptance", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-04-24T20:50:00Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-fpj4-9qhx-5m6m", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "10.2.2", "package": {"ecosystem": "nuget", "name": "DotNetNuke.Core"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 6.0.0, < 10.2.2"}], "withdrawn_at": null}
